note: --locked now wired through every release-path Cargo invocation. check-release-metadata.sh:56 runs cargo metadata --locked --format-version 1, failing the release gate on stale lock. validation.yml runs clippy + tests --locked. tauri-bundles.yml has explicit 'Locked Rust dependency preflight' step on both macOS and Linux jobs, plus cargo tauri build ... -- --locked (trailing -- passes flag through Tauri CLI to underlying cargo build). PKGBUILD uses cargo build --locked --release. Gate passes locally; Cargo.lock in sync with manifests. Any future manifest edit without lockfile refresh will fail at PR time.
